meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Basic App Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop building from scratch. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit guide to accelerate development, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code, and scale your output.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. A robust SaaS starter kit provides pre-configured authentication, database schemas, and payment gateways. By leveraging Antigravity for architecture scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you convert hours of boilerplate into minutes of execution, allowing you to ship production-ready applications for clients at lightning speed.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with developers who spent three days configuring Next.js boilerplate before writing a single line of business logic. You are trapped in the 'beginner's loop'—tinkering with configuration instead of delivering value. Every hour spent on auth integration is an hour you aren't charging for.

But the tide is turning. By adopting a hardened, modular SaaS starter kit, you shift your role from code-monkey to architect. We are leveraging the synergy between Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding and Claude Code’s autonomous implementation to bridge the gap between idea and deployment. It’s time to stop building apps and start shipping empires.

steps.title: Define the Architecture Schema
steps.description: Establish a robust database schema and directory structure that enforces type safety from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular folder structure for a multi-tenant SaaS. Include Prisma schema for User, Organization, and Subscription models. Ensure strict TypeScript configuration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the file structure based on the Antigravity schema definition provided.'

steps.title: Automate Authentication Flow
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade Clerk or Auth.js integration with existing role-based access control (RBAC).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an Auth provider setup with NextAuth.js. Define middleware to protect routes based on user session status and role verification.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the auth middleware and wrap the root layout with the AuthProvider.'

steps.title: Stripe Integration Scaffolding
steps.description: Setup webhook listeners and checkout flows to ensure your SaaS is monetization-ready immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler route for subscription events (created, updated, deleted) and sync with the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the API route for Stripe webhooks and add the necessary database update logic.'

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Inject a high-conversion UI kit using Shadcn/UI for professional, consistent design across the platform.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Install and configure Shadcn/UI with Tailwind CSS. Create a set of base components: Button, Input, Card, and Dialog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize Shadcn and build a base Dashboard layout using these core components.'

steps.title: Deployment & CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to Vercel or Railway with automated testing and deployment triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Vercel configuration file for a Next.js 15 app with optimized build settings and environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the vercel.json file and add a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing.'

pro_tips: Always use environment variable schema validation (like T3 Env) to prevent runtime crashes caused by missing keys.
Treat your starter kit as a private npm package or a git template so you can pull upstream updates into new projects.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth hooks before building the UI to ensure 100% security coverage.
Standardize your database migration folder naming convention to avoid conflicts when merging client-specific changes.
Implement a 'feature flag' system early so you can toggle experimental features without deploying new code.
content.next_steps: Clone your finalized repository, clean the sensitive data, and create a 'Golden Template' in GitHub to trigger new projects in seconds.
content.conversion_block: Stop working harder and start working smarter by treating your code as an asset, not a chore. The market rewards those who ship the fastest with the highest quality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
